items.title: pip & requirements.txt
items.description: You activate a venv and then pip install from requirements.txt to populate it.

items.title: Lockfiles & Reproducibility
items.description: Isolation is the first step; pinned/locked versions make the isolated env reproducible.

items.title: Conda
items.description: Conda environments solve the same isolation problem but also manage non-Python/system binaries.
